articles.title: Watch: Ladakh statehood talks resume: What is MHA offering?
articles.description: Talks between Ladakh’s civil society groups and the Union Home Ministry resumed in New Delhi after last month’s deadly protests demanding Statehood. Officials hinted at possible safeguards under Article 371, but the Leh Apex Body and Kargil Democratic Alliance reiterated their demand for inclusion under the Sixth Schedule. The groups also sought the release of activist Sonam Wangchuk. With tensions high since Ladakh lost its special status in 2019, the region awaits clarity on its political future and autonomy.

topStories.title: Top university says US-Israel attack targeted Iran’s progress, AI learning
topStories.description: Iran condemns systematic attacks on civilian sites, including academic hubs, as war devastates critical infrastructure.

topStories.title: US denies nuclear plan as deadline on threat to Iran ‘civilisation’ looms
topStories.description: Trump's threat to kill 'whole civilization' and comments from VP have raised fears.

topStories.title: Trump reveals what happens if Iran doesn't meet ‘8 pm’ deadline: 'US is ready to...'
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump has extended previous deadlines but suggested the one set for 8 pm in Washington was final.

topStories.title: War, waivers, trade pact likely to be on Misri’s U.S. agenda
topStories.description: Foreign Secretary to begin three-day visit from April 8

topStories.title: NCERT reconstitutes textbook committee after Supreme Court rap
topStories.description: The court had taken up suo motu cognisance of Class 8 social science textbook which discussed a section on “corruption in the judiciary,” and later imposed a ban on use of physical or online copies of the said textbook

topStories.title: After Trump’s 'a whole civilization will die tonight' threat to Iran, UN says: 'Even wars have rules'
topStories.description: Trump's warning clearly states that he is planning to indiscriminately target Iran and Iranian infrastructure, which is a clear violation of the Geneva Convention, which both the US and Iran are signatories of.

topStories.title: Middle East Conflict: Russia, China veto UN resolution on reopening Strait of Hormuz as tensions escalate
topStories.description: Russia and China on Tuesday (local time) vetoed a United Nations Security Council (UNSC) resolution calling for the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. The development comes as tensions escalate following a series of warnings issued by US and Iran.

topStories.title: Iran's oil lifeline Kharg Island hit by US: Why this small coral island is crucial for Tehran
topStories.description: US Vice President JD Vance seemed to confirm reports of US strikes on Kharg Island on Tuesday. The island, key to iran's economy, is situated in the northern Persian Gulf sits just 20 miles off Iran's coast.

topStories.title: FPIs Stay Net Sellers As Trump's Iran Deadline Fuels Market Anxiety
topStories.description: On the other hand, domestic institutional investors stayed net buyers for the 27th day as they bought shares worth Rs 7,980 crore.

topStories.title: Rapper Offset in hospital after being shot in Florida
topStories.description: The rapper is in a "stable" condition, with two people detained in connection with the incident.

dailyNews.title: On Trump's Iran will ‘die’ threat, former US Army officer Lawrence Sellin says ‘military will not obey illegal orders’
dailyNews.description: After US President Donald Trump's fresh threat to Iran, Lawrence Sellin, a retired US Army Reserve colonel, also warned that “the issuance of illegal orders would create a Constitutional crisis.”

dailyNews.title: White House Denies Considering Nuclear Strikes Against Iran
dailyNews.description: The White House denied Tuesday that remarks by Vice President JD Vance about military operations in Iran had contained any suggestion of a US nuclear strike against the Islamic republic.

dailyNews.title: Middle East Conflict: White House denies reports of US considering nuclear strikes on Iran following Vance's remarks
dailyNews.description: The White House on Tuesday (local time) denied that remarks by US Vice President JD Vance regarding military operations in Iran contained any suggestions of a nuclear strike against the Islamic Republic.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens Iran: ‘A whole civilisation will die tonight’
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump warned that “a whole civilisation will die tonight” if Iran does not open the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: US Crude Crosses $117, Brent Jumps As Trump's Iran Deadline Keeps Oil Market On Tenterhook
dailyNews.description: US benchmark WTI rose 4% and hovered near $117, as markets reacted to the heightened risk of supply disruptions.

dailyNews.title: JD Vance backs Orbán's re-election bid in Budapest visit and hits out at EU
dailyNews.description: US Vice-President JD Vance intervenes in the campaign to give Orbán a ringing endorsement in Budapest.

dailyNews.title: Iran 'Stops Negotiations' With US; Pak Role Under Cloud As Tehran Snaps Indirect Channels
dailyNews.description: Tehran shuts backchannel diplomacy amid escalating threats, dimming hopes of last-minute de-escalation

dailyNews.title: D-Street Braces For Gap-Down Start: Gift Nifty Dips Over 1% On Trump's Ominous Iran Threat
dailyNews.description: As of 9 p.m. IST, the market indicator showed 0.82% or nearly 200 points lower opening at 22,948.

dailyNews.title: From 9pm shutdowns to remote work: Egypt cuts fuel amid power crisis
dailyNews.description: Egypt is one of the countries implementing energy conservation measures amid the US-Israel war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Bahamas police search for US woman who reportedly fell off boat
dailyNews.description: Her husband told authorities she fell out of their dinghy on Saturday night and was swept out to sea.

dailyNews.title: West Asia war: India activates helpline numbers, urges citizens in Iran to remain indoors as Trump warns Tehran
dailyNews.description: This advisory comes amid a stern warning issued to Iran by US President Donald Trump, who has warned the former of obliterating their entire civilisation if they do not open the Strait of Hormuz by the deadline he has given.

dailyNews.title: Iran fires back over Trump's ‘civilization will die’ threat: ‘You never had one...will not die over a night’
dailyNews.description: Iran fires back over Trump's 'civilization will die' threat: 'You never had one...will not die over a night'

dailyNews.title: Iran says allies will close Bab El-Mandeb Strait if situation gets out of control: Can it become the next Hormuz?
dailyNews.description: Hours after Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) threatened to target the US and its partners' infrastructure, a senior Iranian source told Reuters on Tuesday (local time) that if the situation gets out of control, Tehran's allies will also close the Bab El-Mandeb Strait.

dailyNews.title: Trump on Iran: ‘A whole civilisation will die tonight’
dailyNews.description: Increasingly angry US president escalates his threats to Iran as his deadline for opening Strait of Hormuz approaches.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration plans to cut cybersecurity agency’s budget by $700 million
dailyNews.description: The budget proposal would force CISA to operate with a significantly lower budget than previous years, citing the government's claims that the election misinformation programs were used to "target the President."

dailyNews.title: Trump calls into Vance-Orban Hungary event: 'My kind of people'
dailyNews.description: Trump praised Viktor Orban at a Budapest campaign rally via phone as JD Vance urged thousands of Hungarian supporters to reelect the prime minister.

dailyNews.title: Ex-Trump ally Marjorie Taylor Greene joins left-wing calls for the 25th amendment as Iran deadline nears
dailyNews.description: Former Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene calls for President Donald Trump's removal via the 25th Amendment after his Truth Social post threatening Iran's civilization.

dailyNews.title: Reporter's Notebook: Why Trump may not be able to force Congress back over the DHS shutdown
dailyNews.description: President Trump may lack constitutional authority to summon Congress back to Washington despite the nearly two-month DHS funding shutdown impasse.

dailyNews.title: A timeline of Trump’s escalating deadlines on Iran and the Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump issues a fresh ultimatum to Iran, threatening strikes on infrastructure unless all vessels can transit the Strait of Hormuz freely.

dailyNews.title: Vance says Iran has '2 pathways' as 12-hour deadline looms, prays US on 'God's side' in nixing nuclear threat
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance accuses Iran of "economic terrorism" and outlines two pathways for the regime as Trump's Strait of Hormuz deadline looms within hours.

dailyNews.title: Iranians Voice Shock and Defiance in Face of Trump’s Looming Deadline
dailyNews.description: President Trump has threatened devastating attacks if Iran does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Some Iranians questioned what had happened to American values.

dailyNews.title: See First Photos From NASA’s Artemis II Moon Mission Capturing a Setting Earth and Eclipse
dailyNews.description: The White House and NASA released imagery captured by the cameras of the four astronauts of the Artemis II mission.

dailyNews.title: What to Watch in the Georgia Special Election to Replace Marjorie Taylor Greene
dailyNews.description: Clay Fuller, a Republican allied with President Trump, will face Shawn Harris, a Democrat, in the election to fill the remainder of Ms. Greene’s term after her resignation from Congress.

dailyNews.title: Trump says "whole civilization will die tonight" as Iran deadline looms
dailyNews.description: Iran's regime calls on civilians to shield power plants as Trump threatens "a whole civilization" with destruction if Tehran doesn't reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns Iran: "A whole civilization will die tonight" if no deal
dailyNews.description: President Trump posted on social media that "a whole civilization will die tonight," adding "but I don't want that to happen, but it probably will."
